name: yxhpy-codex-extensions
description: Public catalog of optional Codex plugins and MCP-oriented tools.

plugins.name: codex-augment-dispatcher
plugins.summary: Extensible reliable-agent workflow, MCP helper, and external CLI adapter hub for owner-agent orchestration across Pi, Codex, Claude Code, Grok, and similar CLIs; adapters cover reliable delivery, workflow artifacts, Claude Dynamic Workflow/ultracode interop, stronger subagent fanout, Claude task gating, Grok augmentation, AGY frontend implementation, high-quality media defaults, GSAP motion guidance, mcp-generator, and deterministic asset slicing.
